title: Ruffle Walkthrough Steps
description: Ordered, calibrated list of playthrough steps. Coordinates are in CANVAS-LOCAL space (origin = top-left of the Ruffle stage, in the authored stage units, e.g. 0..800 x 0..500). The runner converts them to page coordinates using the live canvas bounding box.

meta.description: Free-form metadata about this playthrough (title, source guide, author).

defaults.description: Wait defaults applied to every step unless the step overrides them. Merged on top of config.json's settle block.

id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. "01" or "intro-bullseye". Used for screenshot filenames.

section.description: Human-readable grouping label (e.g. "Intro", "Tangent Universe"). Used as a heading in the generated HTML.

caption.description: Prose shown under the screenshots in the walkthrough.

navigate.description: Optional URL (absolute, or relative to config.baseUrl) to load BEFORE this step's action. Use at page/SWF boundaries. The runner re-waits for Ruffle readiness after navigating.

captureBefore.description: Capture a 'before' screenshot prior to the action.

keepPopup.description: If this step's action opens a browser tab (a news article / info popup via Flash getURL), the runner screenshots it and by default CLOSES it (closing the tab continues the game). Set true to leave it open (rare).

note.description: Calibration note for humans; not rendered. Use for TODOs, passwords, gotchas.

action.description: What input to perform. Omit for a navigate-only or observe-only step.

type.description: click/doubleclick/move/drag use canvas-local x,y. key presses a single key. type sends a string (into a focused Flash text field). none = navigate/observe only. detectClick clicks a runtime-detected red/white feature. flashClick reveals-then-clicks under a sub-second overlay. clickUntilNet re-clicks until a named resource loads. domClick/domType address real HTML elements by CSS selector (HTML-native pages, hidden overlay links, DOM password inputs).

selector.description: For domClick/domType: CSS selector of the target HTML element.

waitVisibleMs.description: For domClick/domType: poll up to this long for the selector to become visible before acting (hidden-overlay reveals).

submitSelector.description: For domType: CSS selector of a submit element to click after typing (alternative to pressEnter).

button.description: Mouse button for click/doubleclick. Note: Ruffle intercepts right-click for its context menu unless the SWF requests showmenu:false.

key.description: Playwright key name for type=key, e.g. "Enter", "y", "ArrowLeft".

text.description: String to type for type=type (passwords, answers). Typed char-by-char into the focused field.

focusX.description: For key/type: optional canvas-local X to click first, to focus the target text field.

focusY.description: For key/type: optional canvas-local Y to click first, to focus the target text field.

pressEnter.description: For type=type: press Enter after the text (submit a password field).

dragSteps.description: Intermediate mouse-move steps for a drag.

repeat.description: For click/doubleclick: perform the click this many times (e.g. to advance an animation montage where each click steps once). Extra clicks on a non-interactive end-state are harmless no-ops.

hoverMs.description: Move the pointer onto the target and dwell this many ms before clicking, so Flash rollover-activated buttons enter their 'over' state first. Needed for the Level 1 menu circles.

delayBeforeMs.description: Pause before performing the action (lets a just-navigated SWF reach an interactive frame).

mode.description: diff-stable: wait until the canvas stops changing. match-reference: wait until the canvas matches a reference still. fixed: just wait fixedMs. none: don't wait.

reference.description: For match-reference: path (relative to the steps file) to a reference PNG of the settled end-state.

region.description: Optional canvas-local sub-region to diff/screenshot instead of the full stage. Useful when only part of the stage animates.

fixedMs.description: For mode=fixed: how long to wait.

stableFrames.description: Consecutive low-diff samples required to call it settled.

diffThreshold.description: Max fraction of changed pixels (0..1) for two samples to count as 'same'.

pixelmatchThreshold.description: Per-pixel color tolerance passed to pixelmatch (0..1). Higher = more forgiving of antialiasing/noise.

matchThreshold.description: For match-reference: max diff fraction vs the reference to count as a match.

maxWaitMs.description: Hard cap; on timeout the runner proceeds anyway and flags the step.

minWaitMs.description: Floor: refuse to declare 'settled' before this many ms have elapsed. Prevents latching onto a brief static moment early in a slow animation (e.g. a long auto-forwarding sequence).
